name: no_hardhat
definition: Worker on-site, head visible, no hard hat

name: no_high_vis_vest
definition: Worker on-site, torso visible, no reflective vest/jacket

name: fall_hazard_unprotected
definition: Open edge / opening / elevated platform with no handrail, OR person at visible height with no harness

name: concrete_crack
definition: Visible crack in cured concrete surface (structural or surface)

name: concrete_honeycomb
definition: Voids / exposed-aggregate patches from poor compaction or vibration

name: rebar_correct_inspection
definition: Reinforcement bars correctly visible during pre-pour inspection (no defect)

name: rebar_exposed_defect
definition: Reinforcing steel visible at surface of cured concrete (cover defect)

name: excavation_slope_unsafe
definition: Excavation slope steeper than safe angle of repose for visible soil type

name: loose_sand_edge
definition: Loose sand or spoil piled at or over excavation/trench edge

name: missing_jersey_barrier
definition: Edge of pit / drop without jersey barrier where one is required

name: missing_lifeline
definition: Worker at height without a visible lifeline anchor

name: non_safety_shoes
definition: Worker footwear that does not appear to be steel-toe safety boot (colour-based heuristic; non-black assumed not safety)

name: faulty_scaffolding
definition: Scaffold without diagonal bracing or with visibly simple/improvised construction

name: missing_toe_board
definition: Scaffold top working platform without a toe board on the edge

name: no_scaffold_green_tag
definition: Scaffold without a green inspection tag visible

name: unorganized_cables
definition: Electrical cables sprawled / tangled / not bundled

name: cables_no_trunking
definition: Electrical cables run without trunking / conduit where required

name: water_near_cable
definition: Standing water or wet surface immediately adjacent to electrical cable (RELATIONAL - V2)

name: ceiling_opening_unsealed
definition: Horizontal ceiling opening not closed by plywood (RELATIONAL - V2)

name: shaft_opening_unsealed
definition: Elevator/services shaft opening not closed by scaffold pipes or plywood (RELATIONAL - V2)

name: rebar_no_plastic_cap
definition: Vertical reinforcement bar end without plastic safety cap

name: uneven_tile_grouting
definition: Tile grouting that is uneven, missing, or inconsistent in width

name: bulging_concrete
definition: Concrete column or wall with visible bulging from formwork failure

name: uneven_plaster
definition: Plaster work with visible unevenness, ridges, or surface waves

name: dirty_false_ceiling
definition: False/suspended ceiling tiles visibly dirty or stained at handover

name: uncentered_electrical_socket
definition: Electrical socket / switch plate visibly off-centre or misaligned

name: no_chamfer_on_edge
definition: Concrete edge without a chamfer where one is required

name: column_misalignment
definition: Column off-alignment with adjacent columns in the same line

name: kerb_misalignment
definition: Kerb stones off-alignment with the road / kerb line

name: dirty_pre_cast_surface
definition: Slab or foundation surface not clean before concrete casting

name: dirty_finished_room
definition: Finished room or space left dirty at handover

name: open_excavation_no_barrier
definition: Open excavation without any perimeter barrier

name: missing_handrail
definition: Stair / platform edge missing handrail
